brief: Today's headlines span Australia's AI licensing debate and child stabbing case, UK overheating crisis and welfare reform, China's economic slowdown, and US-Iran tensions, while research explores cross-domain emotion detection, graph databases, and human-AI collaboration.
news_summary: Global news features Australia's Aria chief calling for AI content licensing, a child accused of stabbing facing racist abuse, UK experts warning of new 'death traps' due to overheating, and China's economic growth falling to 4.3%.
papers_summary: New papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain emotion descriptors, GraphPolaris for graph database query and visualization, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants, alongside studies on health misinformation and human-robot gaze.

en.brief: Today's headlines span Australia's AI licensing debate and child stabbing case, UK overheating crisis and welfare reform, China's economic slowdown, and US-Iran tensions, while research explores cross-domain emotion detection, graph databases, and human-AI collaboration.
en.news_summary: Global news features Australia's Aria chief calling for AI content licensing, a child accused of stabbing facing racist abuse, UK experts warning of new 'death traps' due to overheating, and China's economic growth falling to 4.3%.
en.papers_summary: New papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain emotion descriptors, GraphPolaris for graph database query and visualization, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants, alongside studies on health misinformation and human-robot gaze.

zh.brief: 中国经济增速放缓至4.3%，创2022年底以来新低；霸王龙化石以5010万美元拍出史上最高价；研究首探月经周期与多动症关联。
zh.news_summary: 中国第二季度GDP增长4.3%，低于全年目标并创多年新低。霸王龙化石拍出5010万美元天价。英国首项研究探索月经周期与ADHD症状的关系。
zh.papers_summary: 当日无中文优先论文，英文研究涉及AI辅助跨学科研究、低资源语言健康 misinformation 及人机协作等方向。

todays_image.caption: The public-domain T. rex, a remnant of a lost world, echoes today's stories of ownership over AI content and the irreversible loss of a young life in Perth.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
